transactions.desc: The Blue Jays recalled Dallas from Triple-A Buffalo on Tuesday.
The Blue Jays optioned Pinango to Triple-A Buffalo on Tuesday.
The Cardinals designated Zimmermann for assignment before Game 2 of Tuesday's doubleheader against the Brewers.
The Cardinals selected Shuster's contract from Triple-A Memphis on Tuesday.
The Mets optioned Mauricio to Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday.
The Padres optioned Jacob to Triple-A El Paso on Tuesday.
The Mets selected Seelinger's contract from Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday.
The Padres recalled Brito from Triple-A El Paso on Tuesday.
The Twins recalled Roden from Triple-A St. Paul on Tuesday, Aaron Gleeman of AaronGleeman.com reports.
The Mets reinstated Polanco (Achilles/ankle/wrist) from the 60-day injured list Tuesday.
The Pirates recalled Brannigan from Triple-A Indianapolis on Tuesday.
The Astros recalled Santa from Triple-A Sugar Land on Tuesday, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The Astros optioned Burrows to Triple-A Sugar Land on Tuesday, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The Athletics optioned Serven to Triple-A Las Vegas on Tuesday.
The Mets designated Zuniga for assignment Tuesday, Anthony DiComo of MLB.com reports.
The Athletics recalled Lopez from Triple-A Las Vegas on Tuesday.
The Athletics reinstated Wilson (thumb) from the 10-day injured list Tuesday.
The Phillies recalled Lazar from Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Tuesday, Lochlahn March of The Philadelphia Inquirer reports.
The Phillies optioned Backhus to Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Tuesday.
The Brewers selected Jones' contract from Triple-A Nashville on Tuesday.
Atlanta optioned Murphy to Triple-A Gwinnett on Tuesday.
The Orioles recalled Raquet from Triple-A Norfolk on Tuesday.
The Twins selected Go's contract from Triple-A St. Paul on Tuesday.
Atlanta recalled Karinchak from Triple-A Gwinnett on Tuesday.
Atlanta released Hernandez on Tuesday.
Atlanta selected Thomas' contract from Triple-A Gwinnett on Tuesday.
High-A Fort Wayne reinstated Kemp (oblique) from its 60-day injured list Tuesday.
The Brewers designated Gasser as the 27th man for Tuesday's doubleheader against the Cardinals, and he's scheduled to start Game 2.
The Brewers optioned Perkins to Triple-A Nashville on Tuesday.
The Cardinals recalled Dobbins from Triple-A Memphis on Tuesday.
